response.justification: While the candidate has broad full-stack experience and some exposure to AI-agent tooling, they lack demonstrated production leadership in multi-agent AI systems, fintech infrastructure, or scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people — all hard requirements for this CTO role. Their experience is fragmented across domains without clear ownership of high-stakes, regulated AI systems or financial risk infrastructure.
strengths: Exposure to agentic workflows via MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Strong full-stack and systems engineering background across languages and platforms
Proven track record in open-source tooling and developer infrastructure
concerns: No evidence of designing or operating multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments
Lacks demonstrated experience scaling engineering teams to 30+ or building technical leadership layers
No visible experience with real-time credit risk, working-capital algorithms, or financial compliance infrastructure
